title: Three-Schema Architecture of a DBMS
description: This diagram illustrates the three levels of data abstraction in a database management system, showing how users interact with the database and how these levels are mapped to each other.
relationships: The External Level is mapped to the Conceptual Level by the DBMS
The Conceptual Level is mapped to the Internal Level by the DBMS
The DBMS manages the Internal Level's interaction with the physical database
